Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION across all rejected cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to be performed after Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION compared to the average time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION in variants that include a subsequent resubmission
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION and the next Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in the same case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to occur after the start of the case, considering only cases that later result in a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION in cases that eventually lead to a successful Payment Handled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Payment Handled occurs

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to Request Payment in re-submitted successful paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION grouped by org:resource
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Total time from Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in rework loops that avoid pre-approver rejection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average cycle time of Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION in variants that do not involve any PRE_APPROVER activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER does not occur

Name: Minimum time for Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION in cases where the declaration amount exceeds the median case:Amount
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'", 'end': '', 'aggregation': 'minimum', 'filter': 'case:Amount > median'}"
